Off Calendar May-15-2014 Continued To May-29-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JAMES HOLDER, ESQ., 415.986.5900, FOR PLAINTIFF CMC INVESTMENTS INC. DBA DOLLAR RENT A CAR.
MICHAEL HEATH, ESQ., 415.931.4207, FOR DEFENDANTS MATTHEW DAVIS AND REEAH DAVIS.

RULING: Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs MATTHEW DAVIS and REEAH DAVIS' Motion To Compel Creditor To Execute Acknowledgment Of Satisfaction Of Judgment is continued for further hearing to May 29, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JAMES HOLDER, ESQ., 415.986.5900, FOR PLAINTIFF CMC INVESTMENTS INC DBA DOLLAR RENT A CAR; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CMC INVESTMENTS INC. DBA DOLLAR RENT A CAR's MOTION TO SET ASIDE ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE COSTS is granted. (CCP 473.) The Order Granting the Motion to Strike Costs issued on March 4, 2014 is set aside; Plaintiff never received the motion and thus did not file opposition. Plaintiff shall have the opportunity to oppose Defendants' motion. The hearing on Defendants' Motion to Strike Costs is added to calendar on May 29, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. The moving papers filed on January 30, 2014 shall serve as the moving papers. Defendant shall provide courtesy copies of these moving papers to Dept. 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 13, 2014 at 4 pm. All exhibits must be separated by exhibit tabs. (CRC 3.1110(f).) Plaintiff may file and serve the proposed opposition attached to the instant motion no later than May 15, 2014 at 4 pm. Any reply may be filed and served in accordance with CCP 1005(b). Defendants' request for a penalty pursuant to CCP 473(c)(1) is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sandy Carranza #7062.

Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Chelsea Whelan, Esq. of the Law Office of Michael Heath, Tel. 415.931.4207, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANS MATTHEW DAVIS and REEAH DAVIS' Motion To Strike Memorandum Of Costs Or, In The Alternative, To Tax Costs is Granted. The memo of costs filed on January 20, 2014 is stricken. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: REBECCA WARDELL, ESQ., GORDON & REES, 415.986.5900, FOR PLAINTIFF CMC INVESTMENTS INC; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling WITH MODIFICATION. The claim of exemption is granted. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. $750.00 PER PAY PERIOD WILL BE WITHHELD BY THE EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDER. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
